Manages window transitions, click event handling, version control, metadata, and build scripts.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Manages window transitions and click event handling in a Pebble application.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Configuration to ignore build-generated files in version control.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "Window Transitions" app, including UUID, version, and company information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with customizable rules and SDK integration.
